stemHtml: An aircraft with the call sign F-PO is cruising at FL50. The pilot requests a descent to 3000 ft with a QFE of 1005 hPa. The transition altitude of the area is published in the AIP. How should the ATC respond to the pilot's request?

options.a: "F-PO is cleared to descend to FL50 to 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
options.c: "F-PO is cleared to descend from FL50 to 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
options.d: "F-PO, you are cleared to descend from FL50, transition altitude 3000 ft, QFE 1005."
